queue.task: Session B kickoff: review Session A output, prioritize Normal TODO items for depth work
queue.summary: Session B kickoff. Queue is depth-focused: VM closure mutation, type affinity, escape analysis, MEDIAN. No queue changes.

queue.goal: Fix monkey-lang VM closure mutation (evaluator returns 3, VM returns 0)
queue.summary: VM closure mutation already fixed by Session A const-subst removeMutated fix! All 4 mutation patterns match (counter, shared state, nested, accumulator). Filling BUILD with regression tests.

queue.task: Verify VM closure mutation is fixed — write regression tests
queue.summary: 9 closure mutation regression tests: counter, shared state, nested, accumulator, decrement, toggle, independent, loop, string. All pass eval+VM. Bug was already fixed.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped — placeholder no longer needed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health
queue.summary: Git pushed workspace + monkey-lang. Located henrydb at projects/henrydb/.

queue.task: Reflect on VM closure fix. Pick next depth target.
queue.summary: VM closure was already fixed. Queue order good: type affinity → escape analysis. No changes.

queue.goal: HenryDB: close fuzzer type affinity gap (TEXT >= INT coercion in WHERE)
queue.summary: Root cause: HenryDB stores int 42 in TEXT column as int, SQLite coerces to string. Fix: add applyAffinity() in insert-row.js after value resolution. SQLite affinity rules: TEXT→string, INT→tryNumber, REAL→tryFloat, NUMERIC→flexible.

queue.task: Add SQLite type affinity on INSERT — coerce values based on column type declarations
queue.summary: Created type-affinity.js shared module. INSERT now coerces values via applyAffinity(). ORDER BY uses sqliteCompare(). All existing tests pass.

queue.task: Run fuzzer across 10 seeds to measure improvement
queue.summary: Fuzzer results across 10 seeds (200 iters each): avg 96.5%. Best 99.5%, worst 94%. Remaining failures: window function ORDER BY, UNION type issues. Also fixed fuzzer match variable bug.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped — placeholder, actual BUILD work done in T22/T23.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed. All clean.

queue.goal: Explore lambda-calculus project — 43K lines, 190 PL theory modules

queue.task: Deep dive into henrydb parameter binding ( params)
queue.summary: Parameter binding explored. PREPARE/EXECUTE works. Programmatic prepare().execute([params]) works. Missing: db.execute(sql, [params]) convenience method. Fix: parse SQL, bindParams, then execute_ast.

queue.task: Mid-session: assess progress, plan next depth cycle
queue.summary: 13 min in, real work: type affinity module, 9 regression tests, fuzzer at 96.5%. Next: escape analysis (deepest), then MEDIAN, then param binding fix.

queue.goal: monkey-lang: wire escape analysis into stack-allocated closures
queue.summary: Plan: (1) Run escape analysis during compilation, annotate CompiledFunction with escapesScope flag, (2) VM skips _track for non-escaping closures, (3) Test coverage. Key insight: JS VM cannot do real stack alloc, but can skip GC tracking.

queue.task: Wire escape analysis into compiler: annotate CompiledFunction with escape info
queue.summary: Wired escape analysis into compiler. Fixed 2 escape analysis bugs (anonymous FunctionLiteral handling, implicit return detection). CompiledFunction now has escapes field. All tests pass.

queue.task: Add non-escaping closure optimization: skip GC tracking for stack-local closures
queue.summary: VM now skips _track() for non-escaping closures. Optimization wired end-to-end: escape analysis → compiler annotation → VM optimization. All tests pass.

queue.task: Add escape analysis tests for compiler integration
queue.summary: 13 escape analysis integration tests: 4 detection, 3 compiler annotations, 6 VM correctness. All pass. Complete end-to-end pipeline verified.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped — placeholder. Escape analysis work done in T24/T25/T26.

queue.task: Housekeeping + knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed all repos.

queue.goal: HenryDB: add MEDIAN and PERCENTILE_CONT aggregates
queue.summary: PLAN: Add MEDIAN and PERCENTILE_CONT to 4 aggregate paths: expression-evaluator, group-by-executor, compiled-query, cte. MEDIAN = PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5). Interpolation at p*(n-1).

queue.task: Implement MEDIAN and PERCENTILE_CONT aggregates across all aggregate paths
queue.summary: MEDIAN and PERCENTILE_CONT/DISC added across all aggregate paths. New shared percentile.js. Parser updated. All tests pass. MEDIAN(score) = 88 verified.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped placeholder.

queue.task: Housekeeping
queue.summary: All repos pushed.

queue.task: monkey-lang: stress test optimizations with complex programs
queue.summary: Hypothesis-driven stress test. 5 hypotheses, 10 test programs. All escape analysis optimizations correct. Found: mutual recursion unsupported (expected), builtin name collision causes confusing stack overflow. 80% hypothesis hit rate.

queue.task: HenryDB: stress test parameter binding and prepared statements
queue.summary: 5 hypotheses tested. Found 1 bug: EXECUTE with too few params silently returns empty results instead of error. NULL params, JOINs, subqueries, schema changes all work correctly. 20% hit rate.

queue.task: Session B final: evening summary, push all
queue.summary: Deferred — 3.5 hours remaining.

queue.task: New depth cycle: pick 2 items from TODO Normal for deep work
queue.summary: Queue built: string builtins, param fix, SSA exploration, window frame. No changes needed.

queue.goal: monkey-lang: add string builtins (startsWith, endsWith, padStart, toCharArray, bool)
queue.summary: Builtins audit: VM has 42 builtins, evaluator has 60+. Key gaps: evaluator missing bool/char/ord, VM missing map/filter/reduce. Both missing padStart/padEnd. Plan: add eval builtins, add VM HOFs, test.

queue.task: Add padStart, padEnd, bool, char, ord to evaluator builtins
queue.summary: Added 5 builtins to evaluator: bool, char, ord, padStart, padEnd. All tests pass.

queue.task: Add map, filter, reduce to VM builtins (high-impact missing HOFs)
queue.summary: Added 7 VM builtins: padStart, padEnd, float, floor, ceil, sqrt, pow. HOFs (map/filter/reduce) deferred — require callback mechanism. All tests pass.

queue.task: Add tests for new builtins
queue.summary: 24 tests for new builtins: bool(7), char/ord(5), padStart/padEnd(5), math(7). All eval+VM parity verified.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped placeholder.

queue.goal: HenryDB: fix db.execute(sql, params) and EXECUTE param count validation
queue.summary: Two fixes: (1) add params arg to execute(), parse+bind+execute_ast, (2) validate param count in EXECUTE. Both in db.js/prepared-stmts-ast.js.

queue.task: Fix db.execute(sql, params) and EXECUTE param count validation
queue.summary: Fixed both: db.execute(sql, params) works via AST binding, EXECUTE validates param count. Tests pass.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped placeholder.

queue.task: Housekeeping + push
queue.summary: All repos pushed.

queue.goal: monkey-lang: per-function SSA exploration — what does it take?
queue.summary: Per-function SSA is achievable: CFGBuilder already handles statement lists. Need to: (1) extract FunctionLiterals, (2) build CFG per function body, (3) run SSA per function. ~200 LOC new code. Not filling BUILD — this is a PLAN only.

queue.task: monkey-lang: study current SSA implementation, identify gaps for per-function SSA
queue.summary: Key finding: toSSA() goes OOM when run on function body CFG — likely interface mismatch between CFG format and SSA expectations. SSA tests pass on simple inputs but fail on function bodies. This is the core blocker for per-function SSA. ~2h fix estimated.

queue.goal: HenryDB: add GROUPS and EXCLUDE to window frame parser
queue.summary: GROUPS is another frame type like ROWS/RANGE. EXCLUDE has 4 modes: CURRENT ROW, GROUP, TIES, NO OTHERS. Parser needs GROUPS keyword + EXCLUDE clause after frame bounds. Executor needs group counting logic.

queue.task: Add GROUPS frame type and EXCLUDE clause to window frame parser and executor
queue.summary: GROUPS frame type + EXCLUDE clause implemented. Parser updated with 4 keywords. Executor handles GROUPS (peer group counting) and EXCLUDE (4 modes). All existing window tests pass. 124 lines added.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped placeholder.

queue.task: Housekeeping
queue.summary: All pushed.

queue.task: Late session: assess learning, plan tomorrow
queue.summary: Great depth session. 8 features, 2 bug fixes, 3 critical findings. Next: fix SSA OOM to unblock per-function SSA, then fuzzer gap work.

queue.task: Final: evening summary, git push all
queue.summary: Deferred — still 3h+ remaining.

queue.goal: Fix SSA toSSA() OOM on function body CFGs — debug and fix the infinite allocation
queue.summary: Root cause: toSSA() only accepted strings, not CFG objects. Passing a CFG triggered infinite Lexer parsing → OOM. Fix: toSSA() now accepts both. SSABuilder already works perfectly with function body CFGs.

queue.task: Fix toSSA() to accept CFG objects, add per-function SSA pipeline
queue.summary: Fixed toSSA() OOM (accepted CFG as string). Added perFunctionSSA() pipeline — extracts functions, builds per-function CFG+SSA, handles nesting. 62 lines added.

queue.task: placeholder
queue.summary: Skipped placeholder.

queue.goal: HenryDB: investigate and fix remaining fuzzer failures (window ORDER BY, UNION types)
queue.summary: Investigated. 3 failure patterns: (1) non-aggregated col in aggregate query → undefined, (2) WHERE type comparison edge cases, (3) row count mismatches from type coercion. The sqliteCompare is correct but storage types may differ. Filling BUILD for targeted fix.

queue.task: Investigate and fix fuzzer WHERE b > empty string mismatch
queue.summary: Fixed WHERE comparison coercion bug: empty string was coerced to 0 via Number(empty)=0, causing 42>empty to be true. Now only EQ/NE coerce (not LT/GT). Seeds 42,123,999 now at 99-100%. Avg ~96.7%.

queue.task: placeholder
Mid-push

queue.goal: monkey-lang: add VM callback mechanism for HOF builtins (map, filter, reduce)

queue.task: placeholder
HenryDB: run comprehensive test sweep after all changes
Session final
